pairs.reason: Human fascination with energy beings — sense of wonder
Shared environmental consciousness, complementary temperaments
Both pragmatic survivors, recognise each other's adaptability
Symbiotic parasitism unsettles humans despite Vethara warmth

Being assessed as potential food does not endear

Silicon kindred spirits — shared forge culture and geological patience
Both value honour and duty, different expressions of same principle

Both contemplate, both patient — natural philosophical allies
